cmo_zhuang_ziquan_2009: Zhuang Ziquan (庄梓铨) was a gold medalist at the 2009 CMO (中国数学奥林匹克, China Mathematical Olympiad, the 24th edition) (perfect score 126/126), representing 华南师大附中 with a score of 126/126. CMO gold medalists are the top ~30 high-school mathematicians in China each year, with the top 6 typically selected for the IMO China team. Many alumni go on to undergraduate mathematics at Peking University, Tsinghua University, or top US institutions, and pursue careers in academic mathematics, finance, or technology.

Many alumni go on to undergraduate mathematics at Peking University, Tsinghua University, or top US institutions.
